steps.action: Route order to TA via NSCC/Fund-SERV message
WAIT for 4:00pm ET NAV cutoff (order accrues during day)
Strike NAV; compute shares = notional / NAV
Confirm allotment to broker; instruct custodian
steps.custodian_role_note: TRADITIONAL CUSTODIAN ROLE: receives instruction to expect cash and to credit shares to the investor's segregated sub-account once cash lands. Custodian is the operational settlement counterparty, not just a record-keeper.

steps.action: Cash matched; shares posted to investor account
steps.custodian_role_note: Custodian and TA reconcile via end-of-day file. Investor's beneficial ownership exists as an entry on the TA register; custodian holds cash leg and provides the audit trail.

steps.action: Submit buy intent via portfolio dashboard
Verify allowlist, KYC token, jurisdiction, sanctions
steps.custodian_role_note: TOKENIZED CUSTODIAN ROLE STARTS HERE: the qualified custodian operates / co-signs the wallet via MPC or multisig and is the compliance enforcement point. No cash movement yet.

steps.action: Atomic DvP: mint MMF shares <-> release cash in one tx
steps.custodian_role_note: The transfer-agent function is now the smart contract: the share register is on-chain. Custodian no longer settles cash operationally; its role is key custody + compliance + asset-servicing (corporate actions, distributions).

steps.action: Block finality; custodian reconciles wallet snapshot
